data.title: Analyst Predicts Dollar Rise Amid Fed's Hawkish Stance on Inflation
data.description: On April 29, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group's bank analyst Derek Halpenny stated in a report that if the Federal Reserve acknowledges that the Iran war has driven up energy prices, potentially leading to increased inflation, it may adopt a 'hawkish' stance. According to Jin10, Halpenny noted that this rate decision might be the last meeting under U.S. President Donald Trump's Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Powell could emphasize the accumulating risks to price stability during the press conference. This scenario might cause the front end of the U.S. yield curve to jump and strengthen initial signs of improved dollar demand. Halpenny also mentioned that risks are accumulating for a weaker euro against the dollar and a stronger dollar against the yen.

data.title: Binance Launches ST Trading Competition with $200K in Rewards
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X the commencement of the ST Trading Competition, offering participants the chance to win a share of $200,000 in rewards. The competition introduces a new mechanic called the Early Bird Multiplier, which incentivizes early trading activity. On the first day, trades will receive a 1.8x multiplier, providing a significant boost to participants who engage early. This multiplier is designed to encourage traders to start trading as soon as the competition begins.

Participants can track their trade volume by clicking 'Join' on the Binance App event page. It's important to note that only buy volume will be counted towards the competition, with selling activity excluded from the calculations. This approach aims to focus on buying activity, rewarding those who contribute to the market's liquidity. The competition is structured to engage traders actively and offer substantial rewards to those who participate. With $200,000 worth of rewards available, traders have a significant incentive to join and maximize their trading volume during the event.

data.title: Sui Protocol Aftermath Finance Identifies Security Vulnerability
data.description: Aftermath Finance, a liquidity staking protocol on the Sui network, has identified a security vulnerability within its system. According to Foresight News, the team is actively investigating the issue in collaboration with security partners. As a precautionary measure, the protocol has been temporarily suspended, and steps are being taken to minimize any potential impact on user funds.

data.title: Whale Address Takes Significant Loss on Leveraged DOGE Position
data.description: A whale address beginning with 0x8d0E has reportedly engaged in a leveraged trade involving 40 million DOGE, according to Foresight News. The trade, executed with a 10x leverage, amounts to approximately $4.4 million. Currently, the address is experiencing an unrealized loss of $13.74 million.

data.title: The first prediction market ETFs may launch in the US next week.
data.description: According to Bloomberg ETF analyst James Seyffart, the first U.S. prediction market ETFs may launch next week. Roundhill has filed updated documents with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, planning to launch six prediction market ETFs on May 5th. These products will be designed around contracts related to U.S. presidential and congressional election events. In addition, similar products submitted by GraniteShares and Bitwise may also launch around the same time. James Seyffart believes this reflects the growing trend of combining event contracts with ETF products. (The Block)

data.title: Launch of Enclave: Mezo's New Vault Product for Institutional Bitcoin Deposits
data.description: Mezo has introduced Enclave, a new vault product aimed at institutional Bitcoin deposits. According to NS3.AI, this product is designed to generate yield on Bitcoin deposits by utilizing assets held in custody at Anchorage Digital Bank.

data.title: Traditional Macro Analyst's Journey into Web3
data.description: A traditional macro analyst has transitioned into the Web3 space, exploring the changes in consumption and assets. According to PANews, the analyst's journey began with observing shifts in consumer behavior and asset management, leading to an interest in decentralized technologies. This shift highlights the growing intersection between traditional finance and emerging blockchain technologies, as professionals seek to understand and integrate new digital paradigms into their work. The analyst's experience reflects a broader trend of financial experts adapting to the evolving landscape of Web3, driven by the potential for innovation and new opportunities in the digital economy.

data.title: A whale opened a long position of $4.4 million in DOGE with 10x leverage.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the whale 0x8d0E, which had previously accumulated losses of approximately $13.74 million, opened a 10x leveraged long position in DOGE in the past 2 hours, with a position size of 40 million DOGE, worth approximately $4.4 million.

data.title: Vanguard Group Increases Holdings in Bitcoin Treasury Firm Strive
data.description: Vanguard Group's Total Stock Market Index Fund has increased its holdings in the Bitcoin treasury company Strive, according to ChainCatcher. The fund added 276,200 shares, bringing its total holdings to 1.72 million shares, valued at approximately $25.2 million. Vanguard Group manages assets worth $12 trillion.

data.title: BTC Briefly Rebounds to Key Resistance Level
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) experienced a brief rebound, reaching approximately $77,700, according to ChainCatcher. This movement touched a significant support and resistance level following its initial major pullback.

On the Hyperliquid platform, a whale with the address starting 0x8ca opened a BTC short position using nine times leverage. The position, valued at $13 million, was established at an average price of $77,627. This move appears to be a strategic bet that the price will face resistance and decline near this level.

data.title: Parallel Web Systems Secures $100 Million in Series B Funding
data.description:
Parallel Web Systems, an AI infrastructure company founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal, has raised $100 million in a Series B funding round. According to ChainCatcher, the funding round was led by Sequoia Capital, with participation from existing investors Kleiner Perkins, Index Ventures, and Khosla Ventures. The company is now valued at $2 billion.

Parallel Web Systems focuses on providing efficient web search and access control infrastructure for long-cycle AI agents. The company has raised a total of $230 million to date and employs approximately 50 people. It serves over 100,000 developers and enterprise clients. The current focus is on expanding its sales, marketing, and research and development teams to further develop enterprise-level AI agent web scenarios.

data.title: SignalPlus Showcases Derivatives Capabilities at Hong Kong Web3 Carnival
data.description: SignalPlus participated as a title sponsor at the Hong Kong Web3 Carnival, showcasing its institutional-grade digital asset derivatives trading infrastructure. According to Odaily, the company set up a booth in the main venue's core area, highlighting its expertise in derivatives execution and risk management. SignalPlus engaged with numerous institutional traders and industry professionals during the event.

data.title: Crypto Analyst Highlights Bearish Sentiment in Market
data.description: The cryptocurrency market continues to experience a typical bear cycle, according to Crypto Dan. According to NS3.AI, Crypto Dan pointed out that negative funding rates in futures markets indicate prevailing bearish sentiment. Despite ongoing market fluctuations, there are no clear signals suggesting a transition to a bull phase.

data.title: Economist Predicts Bank of England to Maintain Interest Rates Amid Global Supply Shocks
data.description: Senior economist John Payne from Dun & Bradstreet has reported that despite initial expectations for the Bank of England to cut interest rates in 2026, global supply shocks have altered the bank's policy outlook. According to Jin10, Payne anticipates that the Bank of England will keep the bank rate at 3.75% due to significant increases in global energy and other commodity prices. Payne noted that even though the UK's direct reliance on imports from the Gulf region is relatively low, the country will still face inflation spillover effects, with inflation potentially reaching 3.5% by the third quarter. Maintaining the current interest rate level reflects the central bank's cautious stance on inflation. He also mentioned that recent evidence of resilience in the UK economy has reduced the necessity for a rate cut.

data.title: Santiment Warns of Contrarian Signal Amid Bitcoin's Social Media Optimism
data.description: Santiment has issued a warning regarding the prevalent optimism on social media platforms about Bitcoin's potential recovery to $90,000. According to NS3.AI, the firm noted that bullish sentiments were widespread across platforms like X, Reddit, and Telegram last week, overshadowing bearish perspectives, which were often dismissed as fear, uncertainty, and doubt (FUD).

data.title: Meta Platforms to Offer Prepaid Mobile Recharge Service to WhatsApp Users in India
data.description: Meta Platforms has announced plans to introduce a prepaid mobile recharge service for WhatsApp users in India. According to Jin10, this initiative aims to enhance the functionality of WhatsApp by integrating mobile recharge capabilities directly within the app. This move is part of Meta's broader strategy to expand its services and increase user engagement in one of its largest markets. The service will allow users to conveniently recharge their mobile phones without leaving the WhatsApp platform, streamlining the process and providing added convenience.

data.title: SignalPlus participated in the Hong Kong Web3 Carnival as the title sponsor.
data.description: During the Hong Kong Web3 Carnival, SignalPlus, an institutional-grade digital asset derivatives trading infrastructure platform, participated as the title sponsor and set up a booth in the core area of ​​the main venue. SignalPlus highlighted its product capabilities in derivatives execution and risk management, and exchanged ideas with many institutional traders and industry professionals.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot Trading Volume Hits Lowest Level Since October 2023
data.description: Bitcoin spot trading volume across major exchanges has reached its lowest level since October 2023, according to Foresight News. Data from Glassnode indicates that this decline in trading volume is typically associated with reduced market depth and increased sensitivity to changes in capital flows.

data.title: B.AI and deBridge Collaborate on Cross-Chain Infrastructure for AI Economy
data.description: B.AI has announced a collaboration with deBridge to explore cross-chain infrastructure aimed at enhancing the scalability of the AI Agent economy. According to ChainCatcher, this partnership will focus on seamless cross-chain execution. B.AI is dedicated to developing financial infrastructure for the AI Agent era, while deBridge's zero-TVL model and gas-free cross-chain technology provide a secure and decentralized foundation. Utilizing deBridge's MCP and intent-driven Bundles, the collaboration aims to advance an efficient and secure autonomous trading system, accelerating cross-chain execution in the AI Agent era.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Singapore's Gold Imports from Dubai Reach Record High
data.description: Singapore's gold imports from Dubai reached an unprecedented level last month, marking a significant milestone in the trade relationship between the two regions. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the surge in gold imports as a reflection of increasing demand and strategic trade partnerships. The record-breaking import figures underscore Singapore's growing role as a key player in the global gold market, driven by its strategic location and robust financial infrastructure. This development comes amid fluctuating global gold prices and shifting economic dynamics, positioning Singapore as a pivotal hub for precious metals trading.
